steps.name: Fix compilation error + start aichatsystem server at port 4002
steps.description: Fixed $fast_check→$avail_check in AI.pm chat action (line 1850). Confirmed AI.pm compiles cleanly. Started aichatsystem-ef4e at port 4002. Root cause identified: port 4001 was planningsystem branch, not aichatsystem.

steps.name: Planning integration + Schema Compare AI + Grok 410 fix
steps.description: COMPLETED: project_id/task_id/model on ai_conversations; _build_project_context injected into AI prompt; AI activity panels on todo/project/day templates; project_conversations endpoint (project+task); schema_compare guided fix with sync_schema_field ACTION; Grok pre-flight deprecated-model check; chain_query in Ollama.pm; branch merged with main.

steps.name: AI Project Planning Agent + 3D Print Agent + extractActions bug fix
steps.description: COMPLETED: _build_planning_system_prompt (5-step workflow, live project list injection, create_project+create_todo ACTIONs on confirmation); _build_3dprint_system_prompt (filament guide, troubleshooting, slicer settings, quality-first philosophy); create_project ACTION handler in AI.pm; agents.json updated with 3dprint+planning entries; Fixed extractActions regex in local-chat.js (greedy nested-JSON capture, smart-quote normalization, whitespace before ]). All merged to main.

steps.name: Final merge + verify aichatsystem-ef4e is in sync with main
steps.description: Verify both worktree (aichatsystem-ef4e) and main (comserv2) have all changes: extractActions fix, planning agent, 3dprint agent, create_project ACTION. Confirm AI.pm perl syntax OK in both. Run server restart at 4001. Test create_project ACTION end-to-end from planning agent.
